recommendations.title: Good Gals
recommendations.overview: The story of a gang of French female robbers disguised as men, who operated in the Avignon area in the mid-1980s.

recommendations.title: Genitori vs influencer
recommendations.overview: A father and a daughter with the dream of becoming an influencer clash until they meet the famous webstar and idol of the girl.

recommendations.title: Still Fabulous
recommendations.overview: Stuck in a dead-end career and on a string of terrible dates, the life of 30-something Maddalena is a total mess until one day, she meets an unlikely imaginary friend who comes to her in the form of real-life porn star Valentina Nappi. Her mission? T

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: I Lost My Body
recommendations.overview: A story of Naoufel, a young man who is in love with Gabrielle. In another part of town, a severed hand escapes from a dissection lab, determined to find its body again.

recommendations.title: Man with a Movie Camera
recommendations.overview: A cameraman wanders around with a camera slung over his shoulder, documenting urban life with dazzling inventiveness.

recommendations.title: Feyzo, The Polite One
recommendations.overview: To bid for his beloved's hand in marriage, poor villager Feyzo must come up with an enormous dowry to appease her father.

recommendations.title: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo
recommendations.overview: After the death of her daughter at the hand of her boyfriend, Marisela Escobedo began to fight for justice not only against the murderer but also against the corrupt Mexican judicial system.

recommendations.title: Law of Desire
